title: December Daily Walk Through
excerpt: It was my goal to finish my December Daily album by the end of the year AND shoot a video walk through of it, and I actually did it just in time. Hope you enjoy the flip through showing some…
body: It was my goal to finish my December Daily album by the end of the year AND shoot a video walk through of it, and I actually did it just in time. Hope you enjoy the flip through showing some of the process and then most of the pages. Excited to have this book and 2014 all wrapped up. Have a safe and fun New Year's! Thanks so much for visiting and all of your comments - I read every single one of them and can't wait to share even more with you in 2015.
